app_settings.description: Configuration settings for the function app as key-value pairs

auth_settings.description: OAuth2 authentication settings for securing API access

auth_settings_v2.description: Advanced authentication settings for enhanced security

backup.description: Backup configuration including schedule and storage details

builtin_logging_enabled.description: Indicates if built-in logging is activated for troubleshooting

client_certificate_enabled.description: Specifies if client certificates are required for HTTPS connections

client_certificate_exclusion_paths.description: Paths excluded from client certificate requirement

client_certificate_mode.description: Mode for handling client certificates in HTTPS requests

connection_string.description: Connection strings for the function app's external resources

content_share_force_disabled.description: Indicates if content sharing is forcibly disabled

custom_domain_verification_id.description: ID used for verifying custom domain ownership

daily_memory_time_quota.description: Memory usage quota set for the function app per day

default_hostname.description: Primary hostname of the function app for routing requests

enabled.description: Status indicating if the function app is active

ftp_publish_basic_authentication_enabled.description: Determines if basic authentication for FTP publishing is enabled

functions_extension_version.description: Version of the functions runtime extension in use

hosting_environment_id.description: Identifier for the hosting environment of the function app

https_only.description: Ensures only HTTPS connections are allowed

identity.description: Identity details including principal and tenant IDs

kind.description: Type of the function app, typically 'functionapp'

location.description: Azure region where the function app is hosted

outbound_ip_address_list.description: List of IP addresses used for outbound traffic

outbound_ip_addresses.description: Comma-separated IPs for outbound traffic management

possible_outbound_ip_address_list.description: Potential IP addresses for future outbound traffic

possible_outbound_ip_addresses.description: Possible IPs for outbound traffic as a single string

public_network_access_enabled.description: Indicates if public network access is allowed

service_plan_id.description: ID of the service plan associated with the function app

site_config.description: Configuration settings for the site's runtime behavior

site_credential.description: Credentials for accessing the site, including username and password

sticky_settings.description: Names of settings that remain unchanged across deployments

storage_account_access_key.description: Access key for the function app's associated storage account

storage_account_name.description: Name of the storage account linked to the function app

storage_key_vault_secret_id.description: Key Vault secret ID for the storage account access key

storage_uses_managed_identity.description: Indicates if managed identity is used for storage access

tags.description: Metadata tags for categorizing and organizing the resource

virtual_network_subnet_id.description: ID of the subnet within the virtual network for the app

webdeploy_publish_basic_authentication_e.description: Specifies if basic authentication is enabled for web deployment
